overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a student character in wizard robes exploring a Gothic castle environment. The character transitions from covered outdoor walkways through a grassy courtyard and into a grand hall with a large wooden staircase, ascending to upper levels. The video showcases detailed stone architecture, dynamic lighting, and other student NPCs.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone corridor with Gothic arches. The space is sheltered with natural light filtering through openings. Potted shrubs line the left side as the character approaches the exit to an outdoor area.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit castle courtyard with a manicured lawn and cobblestone paths. Other students are visible walking or gathering near benches. The character approaches the large wooden entrance doors of the Gothic stone building.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand hall with polished marble floors and high ceilings. A large wooden staircase dominates the far end of the room. Another student walks across the hall as the character moves toward the stairs.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand wooden staircase with ornate carvings. Tall Gothic windows provide natural light as the character climbs multiple flights, passing landings with statues and chandeliers. Another student is visible climbing ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character enters an upper corridor featuring a large detailed tapestry on the left wall and upholstered benches. The space has checkered marble floors and Gothic windows. The character walks toward a dark archway at the end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered stone walkway into a bright open courtyard and finally into the opulent interior of a Gothic castle. It begins within a covered corridor of stone arches and potted shrubs, moving forward as the character emerges into a sunlit courtyard filled with manicured lawns and gathering students. The scene then shifts indoors through large wooden doors into a grand hall of polished marble, where the camera follows the character toward a massive, ornate wooden staircase. As the character ascends the stairs past towering windows and chandeliers, the perspective climbs through multiple levels before finally entering an upper corridor adorned with a detailed tapestry and checkered floors.
